title: AI Briefing — 23 July 2026
description: Deep dives: OpenAI’s accidental cyberattack against Hugging Face is science fiction that happened · Treasury threatens sanctions after White House claims Moonshot distilled Anthropic’s Fable · Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business · After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe. Plus 7 quick hits.

description: Deep dives: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face. Plus 3 quick hits and the research corner.
